integration_evidence.summary: Validates local schema metadata, fixture-to-schema version bindings, required fixture fields, successful and failed Run Record store paths, and refs-only boundaries.
Provides the root `pnpm conformance` command that builds the core runtime and runs the conformance package self-check.
Provides conformance package build/typecheck/test/lint scripts with no external runtime dependency beyond the workspace core runtime package.
Documents the repository-level conformance command for schema fixture and Run Record local read/write checks.
Maps GH-100 as the primary Work Item and GH-94 as parent FR evidence without claiming FR completion.

suite_path_consumption.rationale: Narrow Core conformance PR with a repository-level runnable check for existing schemas, fixtures, and local Run Record storage, with no API behavior, admission runtime, generated consumers, database, hosted service, or cross-repo integration.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: Review and PR Ready consume the conformance package, root command, README command documentation, GH-100 carrier, local build/typecheck/test/lint output, PR metadata readback, and hosted checks.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Upgrade to broader suite artifacts when API submit/query behavior, full schema validation, admission execution, result projection, generated types, CLI/MCP/SDK/App-facing API, Harbor/Lode consumption, database storage, hosted service storage, or true-write guardrails are added.
